about: Share a high-quality prompt to add to the library

## 📝 Prompt title

<!-- A short, descriptive title. e.g. "Refactor code for readability" -->

## 🗂️ Category

<!-- Pick one: coding, writing, analysis, creative, education, productivity, business -->

## ✍️ Prompt content

<!-- The full prompt text. Use {{variables}} for inputs the user will fill in. -->
```
Your prompt here...
```

## 📋 Description

<!-- 1–2 sentences: what does this prompt do, and when would you use it? -->

## 🏷️ Tags

<!-- Comma-separated, e.g. "refactoring,code-quality,typescript" -->

## 🤖 Suggested model

<!-- e.g. glm-4.6 -->

## 📸 Example output

<!-- Paste a representative example of the output this prompt produces. -->

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] This prompt is original or properly attributed (no copyrighted material).
- [ ] I've tested this prompt in the playground and it works well.
- [ ] The prompt does not produce harmful, illegal, or harassing content.
- [ ] I've used `{{variables}}` for user inputs.
